channel.title: NVO987 Identity and Research Feed
channel.description: Identity and research feed for Nicholas Van-Orton, independent researcher working on decentralized digital identity, semantic web technologies, and modern and contemporary visual culture.

item.title: Decentralized Web Identity
item.description: Decentralized Web Identity for Nicholas Van-Orton. Identifier: did:web:identity.nvo987.us

item.title: ORCID Researcher Identifier
item.description: ORCID identifier associated with Nicholas Van-Orton.

item.title: ISNI Identifier
item.description: International Standard Name Identifier associated with Nicholas Van-Orton.

item.title: Research Project: Civilizational Interpretive Ratio
item.description: Research examining the relationship between the complexity of autonomous systems and human interpretive capacity.

item.title: Research Project: Color as a Generative Principle in the Work of Sonia Delaunay
item.description: Research exploring color as a generative principle in the work of Sonia Delaunay.

item.title: Scholarly Article: Color as a Generative Principle in the Work of Sonia Delaunay
item.description: Scholarly article by Nicholas Van-Orton published on SSRN.

item.title: Book: Color as a Generative Principle in the Work of Sonia Delaunay
item.description: Book publication exploring the generative principle of color in the work of Sonia Delaunay. ISBN: 978-615-02-6092-1

item.title: NVO987 – Culture Visuelle Moderne et Contemporaine
item.description: Cultural and research association based in Paris, France, founded by Nicholas Van-Orton.

item.title: Semantic Web and Knowledge Graph Research
item.description: Research activities related to knowledge graphs, semantic web technologies, and digital humanities.
